claim: The prediction in atom ATOM_T013_S026_PRE_01 ("I think this will end up being like a gateway drug to software development. ,...") is the resolution of the blocker in atom ATOM_T005_S010_BLO_01 ("Now, in many cases, we cannot evaluate these intermediate operations, but we ...").
first_principles_validity_hypothesis: The predicted future state contains a mechanism that removes the named blocker; the prediction is therefore a market signal for the resolution mechanism.
why_novel_vs_speaker: The speaker frames the prediction (snippet S026) and the blocker (snippet S010) as independent statements; the resolution link is asserted by the analogy engine.
why_potentially_useful: Predictions that resolve known blockers are higher-value than predictions that simply extrapolate trends — they imply an unaddressed market need.
